description: Intent-only request: classify review sentiment routing as hybrid because the model classifies, not chooses actions.

text: Analyze review sentiment, send negative ones to support, auto-thank the positive ones.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the review sentiment request as a hybrid workflow.
The agent explains that the model performs bounded sentiment classification.
The agent explains that negative and positive reviews have predefined actions.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent because the model does not decide what to do next.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as hybrid and distinguishes classification from action selection.
